heading: Voluntary reporting of other cyber incidents
label: 681c Voluntary reporting of other cyber incidents
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c) and struck out former subsec. (c). Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The protections under applicable to reports made under shall apply in the same manner and to the same extent to reports and information submitted under subsections (a) and (b).”Pub. L. 117–263section 681e of this titlesection 681b of this title
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c) and struck out former subsec. (c). Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The protections under applicable to reports made under shall apply in the same manner and to the same extent to reports and information submitted under subsections (a) and (b).”Pub. L. 117–263section 681e of this titlesection 681b of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Entities may voluntarily report cyber incidents or ransom payments to the Agency that are not required under paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of , but may enhance the situational awareness of cyber threats.section 681b(a) of this title

children.heading: Voluntary provision of additional information in required reports
children.label: b Voluntary provision of additional information in required reports
children.text: Covered entities may voluntarily include in reports required under paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of information that is not required to be included, but may enhance the situational awareness of cyber threats.section 681b(a) of this title

children.heading: Application ofsection 681e of this title
children.label: c Application ofsection 681e of this title
children.text: shall apply in the same manner and to the same extent to reports and information submitted under subsections (a) and (b) as it applies to reports and information submitted under .Section 681e of this titlesection 681b of this title
